nasb.text: But no sin offering of which any of the blood is brought into the tent of meeting to make atonement in the holy place shall be eaten; it shall be burned with fire.

esv.text: But no sin offering shall be eaten from which any blood is brought into the tent of meeting to make atonement in the Holy Place; it shall be burned up with fire.

cnv.text: 但是任何贖罪祭，如果它的血帶進了會幕在聖所內進行贖罪，祭肉就不可吃；必須用火燒盡。”

ccb.text: 如果祭牲的血被带进会幕，在圣所内进行赎罪，就不可吃祭肉，必须全部烧掉。
